dict.string: Hope Agent needs Apple Events permission to automate selected apps only when a user workflow asks for it.
Hope Agent needs media library access only when a user explicitly starts a media workflow.
Hope Agent needs system audio capture only when a user explicitly starts an audio workflow.
Hope Agent needs Bluetooth access only when a user workflow needs to discover or connect nearby devices.
Hope Agent needs Bluetooth access only when a user workflow needs to discover or connect nearby devices.
Hope Agent needs calendar access only when a user asks it to inspect or manage calendar events.
Hope Agent needs calendar access only when a user asks it to inspect or manage calendar events.
Hope Agent needs write-only calendar access only when a user asks it to create calendar events.
Hope Agent needs camera access only when a user explicitly starts a visual input workflow.
Hope Agent needs contacts access only when a user workflow explicitly asks for contact information.
Hope Agent needs Desktop folder access only when a user asks it to work with files there.
Hope Agent needs Documents folder access only when a user asks it to work with files there.
Hope Agent needs Downloads folder access only when a user asks it to work with files there.
Hope Agent needs Focus status only when a workflow adapts interruptions or notifications.
Hope Agent needs HomeKit access only if a user enables a Home workflow.
Hope Agent needs your location to provide local weather information.
Hope Agent needs your location to provide local weather information.
Hope Agent needs local network access to discover and connect to local services only when requested.

Hope Agent uses the microphone to transcribe what you say into chat input. Audio is sent to the speech-to-text provider you configure in Settings → Speech-to-Text; nothing is recorded without an active recording session.
Hope Agent needs network volume access only when a user asks it to work with files there.
Hope Agent needs permission to add photos only when a user explicitly asks for a photo workflow.
Hope Agent needs photo library access only when a user explicitly asks for a photo workflow.
Hope Agent needs reminders access only when a user asks it to inspect or manage reminders.
Hope Agent needs removable volume access only when a user asks it to work with files there.
Hope Agent needs speech recognition only when a user explicitly starts a speech transcription workflow.
